creator: shanee@rabbit.augusta.de
text:
While kreating README.html or index ther is an error:

	===> sysutils/xcpustate
	"Makefile", line 16: Unassociated shell command "${MASTER_SITE_XCONTRIB}"

Fix: 

in /usr/ports/sysutils/xcpustate/Makefile delete line 15
How-To-Repeat: 
	goto /usr/ports and do a make readmes or ports-index
